title: atriplex hortensis var. benghalensis
intro: Atriplex hortensis var. benghalensis, also known as Indian orache, is a plant species that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family and is native to South Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Atriplex hortensis var. benghalensis include treating various conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or boiling them to extract the medicinal compounds.
